---
title: "Gallery"
author: "Elham Ebrahimi"
description: "A collection of example outputs from camtrapReport, generated using freely available and published datasets."
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Gallery}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Gallery
